name: GENERAL Elevator Co., Ltd.
summary: GENERAL Elevator Co., Ltd. manufactures and services green elevators worldwide. The company manufactures passenger, panoramic, high-speed, stretcher, and sickbed elevators; freight, car, and dumbwaiter elevators; and commercial escalators, heavy-duty public escalators, and moving walks. It also provides elevator installation and modernization; escalator and autowalk modernization; and intelligent building upgrade solutions. GENERAL Elevator Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Suzhou City, China.
